text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 407 

REDUCED_GAP_CS 

LABEL: Plan Offers Reduced Cost-Sharing in the Coverage Gap 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced Part D cost-sharing during the coverage gap 
(technically referred to as the Initial Coverage Limit [ICL] phase of the Part D benefit), as part of its 
supplemental Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: REDUCED_GAP_CS 

TYPE:
